summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PlantaScan mobile-first web app. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), AI integration confirmed working with GPT-5.2 Vision, frontend fully functional with all 4 navigation tabs working correctly. Previous issues have been resolved.
passed_tests: Backend API GET /api/ returns PlantaScan API v1.0 message
Backend API GET /api/stats returns valid stats with all required fields
Backend API POST /api/scan successfully processes real plant images with GPT-5.2 Vision AI
AI integration working - Haworthia-zebra identified with 90% health score and care tips
Backend API POST /api/plants saves plants from scan_id with suggested reminders
Backend API GET /api/plants returns saved plants list
Backend API GET /api/plants/:id returns single plant with full details
Backend API GET /api/plants/:id/image returns plant image_base64
Backend API POST /api/reminders creates custom reminders
Backend API GET /api/reminders returns reminders list
Backend API PUT /api/reminders/:id/complete marks reminder done and reschedules
Backend API DELETE /api/reminders/:id deletes reminder
Backend API DELETE /api/plants/:id deletes plant and all its reminders
Frontend Scanner page loads with Camera and Galeria buttons (mobile-responsive)
Frontend all 4 bottom navigation tabs work: Scanner, Plantas, Lembretes, Historico
Frontend My Plants page shows empty state when no plants
Frontend Reminders page shows empty state and new reminder form functionality
Frontend History page shows scan history (5 scans found)
Frontend Plant Detail page loads with tabs (Care, Diseases, Reminders)
Frontend Brazilian Portuguese text throughout all pages
Frontend mobile viewport (430x932) working correctly
Frontend Camera and Gallery buttons are clickable and functional
Frontend navigation between all pages working smoothly
Frontend responsive design verified with proper spacing and layout
